name: adb-mcp-indesign
description: AI Agent for Adobe InDesign: 99 tools (layout, text & styles, GREP find/change, masters, tables, typography, TOC/index, templates & data merge, export/preflight, batch orchestration) exposed to LLMs via the MCP protocol.
long_description: Fork of Mike Chambers' adb-mcp, extended to 99 InDesign tools across document lifecycle & visual feedback (page previews the AI can see), pages/layers/guides, text frames & threading with overset reporting, shapes/swatches/images, paragraph/character/object styles, GREP find/change, master pages, tables, advanced typography, TOC/hyperlinks/cross-references/index, templates & data merge, PDF/IDML/EPUB export, preflight & packaging, and reusable action sequences. Exposes Adobe InDesign to any MCP-capable AI client (e.g. Claude Desktop).
